reviews.title: Absolutely terrible and rude cleaners
reviews.text: This hotel is not a five-star hotel, even though it advertises as one. I was stunned at all the misleading advertisements that lead me to book this place for five nights, only to regret it miserably after the first night. First of all, the breakfast is absolutely horrible. On the first day I tried it, I could not eat anything on the buffet line; most of the food looked like they are old or should be served to animals. The staff at breakfast were soul-less and even rude in their eyes and face. Not one single smile from any one of them. Second, the room cleaning is terrible: the hotel is so cheap that they did not replace the body soap even though I had less than half of a tiny bottle left on the second day. No hand soap was provided after the first day. The swimming pool is a joke at 1.3 meters, really only for children. There is no gym at the hotel; and only one restaurant is opened, even though they advertised three restaurants; and it is not 24-hours as advertised; no room delivery service for breakfast. The most absolute miserable experience was the rude and very loud cleaners early in the morning: they would scream at the top of their lungs across the hallways to each other. I was awakened at 7 am and could not fall back to sleep and was completely tired the rest of the day that I could not do anything. The only redeeming thing about this hotel are a few of the nice staff members at the reception, but that is not worth it ever to come back to this miserable hell hole.

reviews.title: Mixed experience
reviews.text:
The Diamond Stars Hotel presents itself as the epitome of luxury in Bentre, yet upon closer inspection, it falls short of its proclaimed five-star status. While it may be the most luxurious option in this small city, it's more aptly categorized as a three to four-star establishment.

Let's begin with the positives. The staff members were undoubtedly sweet and accommodating, diligently fulfilling our additional requests made in advance. The club room boasted ample space and offered a pleasant view of the river, bridge, and the spectacular Lunar New Year fireworks, providing memorable moments during our stay.

However, the shine of these positives quickly fades when confronted with the hotel's shortcomings. The cleanliness of the room left much to be desired; the floor was so grimy that our socks turned black underneath. The state of the bathroom sink was appalling, with an accumulation of grime and unidentifiable debris indicating a lack of thorough cleaning. To add to the disappointment, the amenities were not replenished throughout our four-day stay, and the hotel even charged for a laundry bag, which should be considered a basic provision.

Furthermore, despite displaying a "do not disturb" sign, staff members persisted in knocking on our door, disrupting our peace. The lack of soundproofing in the room meant that we were subjected to every conversation in the hallway and neighboring rooms, severely impacting our comfort and privacy.

The absence of a gym or spa, purportedly due to them not being ready yet, was another disappointment considering the hotel's five-star billing. Additionally, the lack of taxis readily available around the hotel meant lengthy wait times of 20 to 30 minutes when requesting transportation, which inconvenienced our plans and detracted from the overall experience.

In conclusion, while the Diamond Stars Hotel may currently hold the title of Bentre's first five-star hotel, its quality and service do not reflect this accolade. Should there be no alternative five-star accommodations in the foreseeable future, we may reluctantly find ourselves returning to this establishment out of necessity rather than choice. It's a disappointing realization that even the purported pinnacle of luxury in Bentre falls short of expectations, leaving much to be desired in terms of both quality and service.

reviews.text: While everything about this hotel from spacious and clean room to amazingly friendly staff was great, what killed it for us and deciding not to want to come back here was the fact that at checkout they charged for a small towel that they claimed was too dirty to wash and also charged for a laundry bag that we used to put our used clothings into. In 30+ years of travels around the globe, this was the first ever for a hotel to charge a free for the small towel ~ and it was not about the amount as the fee was negligible but more about the principle - when I questioned why? The response was that it was hotel’s policy yet said policy was never revealed during check in. Again staff was super friendly and nice but they should make it a point to let the guests know ahead of time about such policies and not risk losing future stays with guests.

reviews.text:
Good location  
Check-in - good  
Parking garage - good  
Staff is lovely and friendly  
Drawbacks:  
- The elevator system is extremely noisy when in operation; it can be heard clearly in the room, especially room 03. It's very difficult to relax for anyone sensitive to noise. It’s better to use rooms without elevators, like room 36, which is fine.  
- In summer, families with small children like to swim, but the pool is very dirty, with a lot of dust on the surface and at the bottom, completely covered. The chlorine smell is very strong; it’s unbearable.  
- The decoration in the breakfast area needs renovation; I notice several rusty metal pieces, which is aesthetically unpleasing.  
- The balcony in the room needs to be dusted and cleaned as it is very dirty.  
- Improvement in the pastry counter is very good during breakfast.  
- It's very important that the reception area has a sofa that is very dirty; it used to be white and now looks like porridge. I think re-upholstering the sofa in a darker color is necessary and urgent.  
Personal opinion after several stays  
I hope the hotel management pays attention to my comments because in the central area of Ben Tre City, Diamondstar Hotel is the most prominent!!!

Chúng tôi rất trân trọng phản hồi của Quý Khách. Với vị trí trung tâm, chúng tôi cam kết không ngừng cải thiện để luôn là lựa chọn nổi bật.

reviews.title: Poor management
reviews.text:
The buffet is the best I’ve had at any hotel buffet!  

However, Five star hospitality is beyond the bowing and smiles. The staff actually look profoundly unhappy going about their business, which says to me poor management, pay or working conditions. 

I was rather happy with my stay overall up until the last night we were there.  We needed to leave at 4am to catch a flight, we were up til midnight packing our bags and upon getting to bed heard some music and karaoke blasting. It was so unbelievably loud that there was no chance of getting any sleep despite our weariness. I opened the balcony to find the source of the music wasn’t from the street but somewhere below us. I called reception and they clearly knew what the noise was about but just told me they would investigate.  One hour later I went down to level five to see for myself and there were 20 or so people drinking and singing karaoke together. I don’t know if they were staff or customers but the noise continued until 2:30am which left us 1 hour to sleep before our big day. 

This level of noise is unacceptable and especially from a 5 star establishment!

reviews.text:
Staff were always polite but it’s not about bowing and smiling all the time.  There were two incidents that left a bad taste for me: lack of health and safety led to an accident which will leave a literal scar on my partner. There was a lot of blood, hence a lot of attention from staff at the time, and disappointingly, a complete lack thereof after.  We then found the same accident risk being repeated the next day. 
The second incident was the worst.  It was our last night and we needed to leave at 4am in the morning. We were in bed then extremely loud karaoke’ing started blasting around midnight.  We thought it’s from the street but upon checking the balcony, identified that it’s from the level 5 restaurant area. I then called reception and they said they’d look into it … an hour later and all that’s happened is the music was slightly turned down.  I came down to level 5 and noticed there were about 20 people partying there. The karaoke was turned off after 2am. We had 1.5hrs sleep before our flight overseas

reviews.title: Very high quality hotel and excellent value
reviews.positives: I stayed about 3 weeks and I liked the hotel so much I was genuinely sorry to leave. I am looking forward to returning. My room, 1004: Spacious and luxurious. View: Neighborhood,  Ben Tre River and rural scenes. More than adequate seating and lots of storage for luggage and the other items one would travel with. Big and usable space in the closets and lots of hangers. Bed: Wide, long, and really comfortable. Medium firmness mattress and pillows. Bedding was high quality and very comfortable. Bathroom: Spacious with deluxe features and appointments. Lots of hot water and a rainfall shower as well as other shower configurations and a large tub. Cleanliness: 10 out of 10 for hygiene, sanitation. Housekeeping staff kept the room in pristine condition. Air conditioning: Perfect placement and quiet operation. Quiet: The room, the hotel, and the neighborhood were very quiet and the setting was tranquil. Building and facilities: Lovely looking 5th floor outdoor swimming pool with comfortable lounge chairs and a comprehensive view of the neighborhood, river, and rural areas. Secure parking for bikes and vehicles. The elevators worked flawlessly. Security cameras and in person security personnel were dependable and effective in the public areas throughout the property. Location: Across the street from the Ben Tre River and bridge, landing/dock and river boats. Bike rental less than 2 blocks away. Extensive and interesting local market across from the hotel and blocks of small local businesses on two sides of the hotel. Neighborhood: Interesting and safe. Breakfast buffet: Large variety; both Asian and Western. 5th floor restaurant with lovely view. Food quality satisfactory and tasted delicious. The lobby reception and guest services staff, management, and the housekeeping staff were exceptionally helpful, accommodating and gracious. Special thanks to Mr. Tan and to hotel management and supervisory staff. You made my stay exceptional, and I can’t wait to come back.
reviews.negatives: Nothing. I thought this hotel was a real find among all hotels where I stayed in various locations in Vietnam (about 15). Diamond Stars Ben Tre was by far my favorite.

reviews.title: Very TERRIBLE experience
reviews.text:
-I booked a room for one night at the hotel on February 18, 2025. The staff assisted me with an early check-in at 12 noon and helped with my luggage. However:
+ The air conditioning in my room was very weak and not cooling at all. I called the reception for assistance, but I had to call twice before someone came to help (from 1:00 PM to 1:50 PM), but the outcome was that I had to switch rooms. One employee helped me move to a new room, and when my friend hung a t-shirt on the hook and wanted to take it with him, this staff member yanked the shirt off the hook. My friend saw this and said to let him take it, but the staff member said, "If you take the hook from this room to the next room, housekeeping will go into the new room to get a hook and return it to the old room ????" It was said vaguely and seemed unpleasant when we took the hook with us, but isn’t rearranging just ONE coat hook that difficult??? 
+ After moving to the new room for 10 minutes, I received a call from a male receptionist asking if the air conditioning was working properly and if I had taken an electronic scale from the old room to the new one? Why would they ask customers like that as if we were thieves, while during the room transfer, the support staff was right next to us assisting and carrying the luggage to the new room. As a customer, I felt insulted; if something was missing in the room, why didn’t the staff check with the housekeeping department first instead of calling us as if we were the ones stealing, when there was no scale in the first room from the beginning? It’s really hard to understand!!
+ Around 3 PM, I went down to the reception to meet the manager, but the Reception Supervisor said the manager was on a business trip, and only she was the supervisor on duty. If any issues arose, I should speak directly to her. How can a large hotel have only one supervisor on duty when a customer needs to see a manager?? (But under the general manager, there should be a duty manager, lobby manager, assistant lobby manager, and accommodation block manager.) After I explained everything that happened, the response I received was, "I'm sorry, this may just be a misunderstanding."
- This is the worst experience I have ever had, perhaps because I do not appear to be wealthy, so some staff look down on us and have an attitude when assisting us. With such staff, do they deserve to be called a 5-star hotel?
reviews.response:
Thân gửi Quý khách, 
Trước hết, chúng tôi chân thành cảm ơn Quý khách đã để lại bình luận cho chúng tôi. Chúng tôi rất xin lỗi vì những bất tiện đã xảy ra trong khi Quý khách sử dụng dịch vụ tại khách sạn. 
Những nhận xét trên đã được chúng tôi ghi nhận và chuyển đến các Bộ phận có liên quan để kịp thời xem xét và giải quyết, hạn chế những trường hợp tương tự xảy ra trong tương lai. 
Một lần nữa, chúng tôi thành thật xin lỗi Quý khách và nếu có cơ hội, chúng tôi rất mong sẽ được chào đón Quý khách quay trở lại khách sạn và trải nghiệm những dịch vụ được cải thiện tốt hơn.

reviews.title: Pas mal
reviews.positives:
Bel hôtel, avec un personnel aux petits soins, toujours gentil et souriant.
La chambre est parfaite : propre, bien équipée, confortable. Le petit déjeuner est également excellent.
L’hôtel est plutôt bien situé à Bến Tre. Bien qu’un peu à l’écart du centre, on trouve de petits endroits sympas pour manger le long du Mékong, sur la droite en sortant.

Point négatif : il n’y a pas de prêt de vélos, ce qui aurait été idéal — surtout au vu du prix de l’hôtel — pour se balader le long du Mékong et découvrir les îles alentour.
Le restaurant de l’hôtel, quant à lui, est assez cher pour une cuisine manquant de saveur.

reviews.title: Reasonable place to stay in Ben Tre city
reviews.text: Located at the heart of Ben Tre city with a outstanding river view, the hotel brings convenient facilities (e.g. swimming pool, cleanliness of the room) with reasonable price. You also have a nice view on the sunset with a cup of tea/coffee. Love it!

reviews.title: Un hôtel parfait !
reviews.positives:
Nous avons absolument tout aimé dans cet hôtel : son emplacement idéal dans la ville, la gentillesse de l'accueil, le confort extrême et la taille de la chambre et de la salle de bains, la vue, la lumière, le petit-déjeuner extrêmement varié pris dans une immense salle panoramique et j'en oublie sûrement. Nous avons testé beaucoup d'hôtels au Vietnam et celui-là restera un excellent souvenir et un des meilleurs, le tout à un prix particulièrement compétitif. 
Personnel très réactif pour dialoguer sur Whatsapp à propos de notre heure d'arrivée et d'un éventuel check-in anticipé. Ils ont également organisé notre transfert en taxi depuis l'aéroport d'Ho Chi Minh : c'est une solution simple et rapide si l'on veut aller directement dans le delta.
Un tout petit reproche pour finir : il n'y a pas de vélos à louer à l'hôtel (ni dans la ville malheureusement) et c'est vraiment dommage. Le delta du Mékong est vraiment l'endroit idéal pour faire du vélo, notamment à partir d'une petite ville comme Ben Tre, Ce n'est pas compliqué et ce serait vraiment un plus pour les touristes. 
Sinon encore merci à toute l'équipe pour ce séjour idéal.

reviews.title: Value for Money
reviews.text: An excellent hotel in Bentre. Probably one of the tallest building there. You get an amazing view of the river and also if you are lucky to get a higher floor, you can see more. I love how serene it feels to look outside. There are two air conditions for the suite rooms. Only issue was water pressure for hot was low. But you get what you can here and they do an amazing job. Staffs are highly professionals and courteous. Could see myself living here.

reviews.negatives:
RAS, quelques détails de réparations à réaliser à la piscine, dans l’ascenseur, la douche.

reviews.title: Another good hotel in Ben Tre.
reviews.text:
I think this is a place worth considering when traveling in Ben Tre.
- The location is very good in the center, close to the church, near the market, dining, parks...
- The rooms are clean, although a bit old, they are still okay, the air conditioning system is quiet, however, I personally find it a bit noisy at night.
- Staff: The staff at the hotel are friendly, enthusiastic, and cheerful. I appreciate the bellman with a slightly dark complexion, a bit on the heavy side, who is very cheerful and helpful.
- I find breakfast here suits my taste. Delicious dishes such as: sticky rice with mung bean, pasta with cream sauce, steamed leaf cake, yogurt...

We had a wonderful stay at this hotel in the heart of Ben Tre city. The location is perfect - just a short walk to the market and all major attractions, making it very convenient for exploring the city.

The staff were incredibly friendly and went out of their way to support our young children, which made our stay even more enjoyable. Their warm hospitality really stood out.

The only small downside was that the kids' room didn't have many activities, so it would be great if they could add more entertainment options for little ones. Otherwise, everything else was excellent. Would definitely recommend this hotel for families looking for a comfortable and convenient stay in Ben Tre!

reviews.title: Ein großes Hotel mit zentraler Lage für eine Mekong Delta Tour.
reviews.positives: Die Zimmer sind großzügig mit Balkon, mit Blick auf den Ben Tre River. Es liegt direkt am Central Market. Gute Infrastruktur in Umgebung ( Banken, Taxi, Regierungsgebäude, Einkaufszentrum und viele Geschäfte). Frühstück hat eine große Auswahl , ist reichhaltig und vietnamesisch/europäisch. Frische Eier und Suppenzubereitung, Brotauswahl ist gut. Säfte und Teeauswahl ist gut. Die Ausstattung des Restaurants und Frühstücksraum waren schön und offen. Die Aussicht war sehr gut. Vom Hotel kann man gleich zu einer Flußtour starten, die über das Hotel gebucht werden kann. Sehr ruhige Zimmer
reviews.negatives: Bar im obersten Stockwerk wird noch gebaut. Restaurants um das Hotel herum haben mittelmäßige Beurteilungen und Qualität. Der kleine Pool befindet sich genau im Frühstücks- und Restaurantbereich. Kinderpool und Erwachsenen Pool sind miteinander verbunden, so dass viele Gäste mit ihren Kinder ein Fußbad nehmen, während sie am Frühstück sitzen. Ich fand es unhygienisch. Der Pool wird jeden Tag nach 19h chemisch behandelt, um gereinigt zu werden.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Clean, this room is more spacious and airy than the 35 m2 room, the staff is okay, the breakfast buffet is okay. The only issue is the air conditioner is a bit noisy due to the strong wind. If someone sleeps soundly, it should be fine, as I tend to be a light sleeper. The staff helped me check out two other available rooms, but they were similar, so I stayed in the old room. The staff explained that it was close to the air conditioner's maintenance schedule. Next time, it will be fixed. Overall, it's still okay; I still recommend that everyone stay here when visiting Ben Tre.

Was für ein fantastisches Hotel zu einem unschlagbaren Preis-Leistungsverhältnis! Unser Zimmer war richtig groß und gut eingerichtet mit einem sehr bequemen Bett, schönem Licht, viel Ablagefläche, tollem Blick, riesigem Badezimmer.
Das Personal war unglaublich freundlich und hilfsbereit. 
Der große, luftige Raum, in dem das Frühstück serviert wird, hat uns auch sehr gut gefallen.
reviews.negatives:
Die Klimaanlage in unserem Raum ließ sich nicht gut einstellen und war viel zu laut.
Das Frühstück hat uns sehr gut gefallen, die Auswahl ist riesig. Allerdings schmeckt das Brot überhaupt nicht gut und auch die Obstauswahl hat uns nicht überzeugt. 
Ansonsten alles bestens.

reviews.title: Sehr zufrieden!
reviews.positives: Das Zimmer, sowie das Badezimmer waren sehr geräumig. Alles war super sauber und das Bett sehr bequem. Zudem steht 24/7 ein Roomservice zur Verfügung, der nicht teurer ist als wenn man direkt im hoteleigenen Restaurant isst. Allgemein kann man das Essen im Hotel empfehlen, es war wirklich gut und auch bei der Lage das “Sicherste” als Tourist*in. Das Personal war sehr freundlich, wenn auch zum Teil etwas schwierig mit der Kommunikation auf Englisch. Das Frühstücksangebot ist sehr groß, jedoch für Vegetarier/ Veganer wiederum etwas schwieriger, da nahezu alle asiatischen Speisen Fleisch beinhalten und dies das Hauptangebot ist.
reviews.negatives: Essensauswahl beim Frühstück sowie à la carte im Restaurant könnte mehr vegetarierfreundlich gestaltet werden. Ein zusätzliches vegetarisches oder veganes Gericht in beiden Belangen (gerne auch vietnamesische Küche) wäre super.

- Watch your steps in & out buffet area.

reviews.title: Urlaub in Ben Tre
reviews.positives: Das außerordentlich Freundliche und jederzeit Hilfsbereite Personal sowohl an der Rezeption als auch im Service allgemein. Es wurde versucht jeden Wunsch zu erfüllen! Ein besonderes Lob noch an Bellman Dat Ly! Er hat uns schon vor unserer Ankunft super betreut sich um den Shuttle vom Airport gekümmert und war jederzeit erreichbar. Auch während unseres Aufenthaltes war er immer um unser Wohlergehen bemüht :) Die Zimmer waren super bequem und gemütlich. Auch die Sauberkeit war Super! Leckeres Frühstück und eine  tolle Poolbar
reviews.negatives: Einzig das permanente Ambiente Licht im Badezimmer störte etwas da man es nicht abschalten konnte.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Love this place, best in town, affordable pricing for foreigners, though perhaps not locals. One thing very disappointing as a repeated guest, they do not have an iron or steamer provided for us. We had to go to a wedding. And they said it would take 45 mins to steam our clothes and asked for us to pay 500,000 VND before they would do it— as if we are not going to pay. It was the only bad experience I had there. Hotel is clean and I would stay again, though, go buy your own steamer across in the Ben Tre Market for 250,000VND. Not a 5 star hotel if you don’t provide everything 5 star hotel provides. Not sure why they have weight scale in each room without batteries, it’s nonfunctional. And they don’t have a iron or steamer, just really funny to us.

reviews.title: Luxus pur in sonst armer Umgebung
reviews.positives: Die Lage am Fluss und damit direkter Zugang zur Boat Tour ist top! Die Boat Tour war sehenswert, bis auf den einen üblichen Besichtigungsstopp mit Folklore! Im Hotel bekamen wir im 15. Stock eine Top Zimmerkategorie! Es fehlte an nichts!
reviews.negatives: Ben Tre wird als Ort überschätzt! Dafür kann das Hotel natürlich nichts. Jedoch muss hier seitens der Stadt oder des Tourismusverwaltung ordentlich Hand angelegt werden!

reviews.title: Best in BenTre
reviews.text: This Diamond Star Hotel is the most beautiful and convenient hotel in BenTre central. It’s close to the market, shopping, restaurants, coffee shops…. And good view of the river beside. Helpful and kindly staffs. Nice breakfast buffets. Clean and modern room. Prices are reasonable compared others 5 stars hotel. Truly recommend to everyone. Don’t miss it when you are coming to BenTre.

reviews.title: Truffa.
reviews.positives: Camere abbastanza spaziose
reviews.negatives: Lo staff si è comportato malissimo nei nostri confronti. Siamo stati truffati dal taxista che ci ha accompagnati in hotel che, dopo aver pattuito un prezzo via sms, al momento dell’arrivo ha raddoppiato la cifra. Lui si è subito rivolto alle ragazze in reception che, nonostante i messaggi che abbiamo prontamente mostrato, non hanno preso assolutamente le nostre difese e anzi, pur trovandoci in grande difficoltà e pur avendo ragione al 100%, ci hanno chiesto di pagare quanto richiesto dal taxi. Non ci siamo sentiti nè tutelati in quanto turisti in un paese straniero, nè aiutati dallo staff che anzi, ha collaborato con una TRUFFA contro di noi. Un hotel che non consiglierò mai perchè non ha avuto rispetto per due ospiti in grandissima difficoltà e che stavano subendo una truffa e un’ingiustizia. Diffidare da questo hotel.

reviews.text: The hotel is clean, beautiful, and has an amazing view! The food is delicious, the staff are enthusiastic, worthy of a 10/10.

L’albergo è molto grande ma forse un po’ poco vissuto. Nei dintorni soprattutto la sera non c’è molto da vedere, ma vale la pena soggiornare a Ben Tre per visitare il delta del Mekong che è decisamente affascinante. Il ristorante dell’hotel è molto bello e la cucina non è male, peccato fosse un po’ vuoto quando siamo stati noi. 
Staff molto cordiale e disponibile.
reviews.negatives:

reviews.title: Service niet altijd praktisch
reviews.positives: De faciliteiten van de kamer zijn geweldig. Het fruit en de soep als onderdeel van het ontbijtbuffet zijn lekker. Het personeel is vriendelijk.
reviews.negatives: De policy om direct bij binnenkomst te betalen getuigt van klantonvriendelijkheid en is ouderwets. De eigenaar kan dit eenvoudig oplossen door dit te laten aanpassen op de site van Booking zodat de kosten bij check-in automatisch worden afgeschreven. Op die manier hoeven gasten ter plaatse in het hotel niet te worden lastiggevallen en verloopt de incheckprocedure efficiënter. Personeel spreekt niet (verstaanbaar) of nauwelijks Engels. Voor een (Vietnamees) 5 sterren hotel zou anno 2024 al het personeel Engels moeten kunnen verstaan en spreken. Het water van de pool is onmenselijk koud. De pool is om die reden een zinloze faciliteit en niet bruikbaar.

reviews.title: Perfecte plek om de authentieke omgeving te zien & toch te genieten van comfort!
reviews.positives:
Dit hotel ligt aan de rivier naast de overdekte markt (erg authentiek; prachtig om te zien!) en naast de avondmarkt. Vanuit deze locatie ben je ook zo in het modernere gedeelte Ben Tre. 
De kamers zijn groot en erg netjes. Het ontbijt is mega uitgebreid met voor echt elk wat wils. Erg goed! 
En het personeel is super lief! Niet opdringerig gewoon echt heel erg aardig!
Ze hebben voor ons een last minute rondvaart geregeld met gids en bezoekjes aan lokale bedrijven. Ietwat toeristisch, maar zeker de moeite waard voor een goede indruk van de omgeving en de lokale bevolking. Heel erg bedankt voor jullie goede zorgen, mede door jullie nu al een onvergetelijke vakantie!
reviews.negatives: Alles was perfect voor elkaar en goed onderhouden. Glazenwassers zijn bezig om alle ramen van het hele gebouw te wassen. Helemaal top!

reviews.title: 安心して泊まれるホテル
reviews.positives: 街の中心部にあり、ヤシの木がどこまでも広がるメコン川デルタ地帯を一望できる唯一の高層ホテル。豪華な内装、高級感のある部屋、アメニティも揃っている。クーラーもよくきき、シャワーも問題なし。豊富でおいしい朝食ブッフェ（ただしあまりメニューは変わらない）。目の前が生鮮市場なので買い出しもすぐできて便利。親しみやすく笑顔の絶えないスタッフたち。滞在前から様々な質問にメールで答えてくれて、本当に助かった。担当者が非番の日でもメールするとすぐに返信してくれた。
reviews.negatives:
・ルーフトップバーが閉鎖していて残念
・朝食会場は屋外なので開放感あるが、クーラーのあるエリアがあればよかった
・レンタルバイク料金を現金でしか支払えないのでカードが使えたらよかった
・部屋の壁が薄いのはベトナムあるあるだが、この5つ星ホテルでもやはり薄くて…

reviews.title: Excellent location with lots of local restaurants, markets nearby and next to river bank. Only 4star
reviews.positives: Hotel cao cấp nhất ở Bến Tre. Vị trí cực tốt, nhìn ra sông, cạnh bên chợ, có nhiều hàng quán ăn ngon xung quanh. Tầm nhìn trên cao rất tốt. Nhân viên tiếp tân lịch sự, bảo vệ chu đáo giúp khách đậu xe. Tổng quan thì hotel chỉ khoảng 4 sao, dù vị trí là tuyệt vời.
reviews.negatives: Phòng tiêu chuẩn xịn 5 sao dù trong phòng có kiến ở minibar. Trong phòng có thiết kế một bàn dài dọc tường và và kéo qua che 1/3 tầm nhìn cửa sổ (từ trần đến sàn), phí phạm view của phòng mà bàn thì dư thừa không thể dùng hết. Giữa bàn và cửa sổ có khe nhỏ, rất dễ rớt đồ xuống mà khách không biết (mình bị rớt cục sạc phone, may tìm kỹ mới thấy ngay sau lưng bàn, mà muốn thấy phải chồm qua bàn nhìn xuống phía sau mới thấy). Phòng cách âm không đủ. Mấy đứa nhỏ ở phòng bên nhắn tin nói qua nghe hết những gì mình nói bên phòng mình. Hồ bơi có rác, có thể do khu vực hồ bơi làm chung với khu ăn sáng, rất không tiện để bơi vì khách bơi phải đi qua nhà hàng và rác từ khu ăn uống rớt xuống nước. Đồ ăn sáng tạm được chứ không ở mức 5 sao. Resptionist quên welcome drink dù khách đến sớm ngồi chờ phòng và đi ra đi vào trước quầy reception cả buổi sáng.
